video_subject: A street vendor in Mumbai, an elderly Indian man with weathered features, skillfully preparing Vada Pav. He flips the golden-brown batata vada in a bubbling cauldron of oil with a focused, proud expression.
motion_dynamics: High-velocity oil splashes in slow-motion; steam rising in thick swirls; rapid rhythmic movements of the vendor's hands as he assembles the pav.
temporal_storyboard: 0s: Close-up of the vendor's hands sliding a fresh vada into the hot oil.
4s: Mid-shot of the vendor's face through a layer of steam, a subtle smile as he works.
8s: The final Vada Pav is held up, wrapped in a scrap of newspaper, with the vibrant green chutney dripping slightly.
visual_style: Raw editorial photography style. Authentic urban Indian aesthetic, moody street lighting using ambient vendor stall bulbs, high contrast with deep shadows, shallow depth-of-field.
negative_prompt: shaky camera, low framerate, flickering, distorted faces, text, watermarks, morphing artifacts, generic CGI, clean sterile kitchen.
